properties.name: gen-ai-config.cache-templates
properties.description: Determines if prompt templates should be cached in memory.

properties.name: gen-ai-config.enabled
properties.description: Flag to enable or disable the GenAi service.

properties.name: gen-ai-config.record-enabled
properties.description: Flag to enable recording of prompt responses as mocks.

properties.name: gen-ai-config.record-folder
properties.description: Folder path where recorded prompt responses (mocks) are stored.

properties.name: gen-ai-config.batch-folder
properties.description: Folder path where batch submission and response files are stored.

properties.name: gen-ai-config.batch-max-tokens
properties.description: Maximum total tokens per batch file.

properties.name: gen-ai-config.batch-api-endpoint
properties.description: The OpenAI Batch API endpoint URL.

properties.name: gen-ai-config.batch-poll-interval
properties.description: Poll interval for batch status checks.

properties.name: gen-ai-config.google-api-json
properties.description: Google Cloud service account JSON content for Gemini authentication.

properties.name: gen-ai-config.replacements
properties.description: Character replacements applied to generated text before parsing.

properties.name: gen-ai-config.repair-enabled
properties.description: Enable JSON repair attempts when initial parsing fails.

properties.name: gen-ai-config.reasoning-model-prefixes
properties.description: Model name prefixes treated as reasoning models.

properties.name: vertex.batch.project-id
properties.description: GCP project id for Vertex batch jobs.

properties.name: vertex.batch.location
properties.description: GCP location for Vertex batch jobs.

properties.name: vertex.batch.bucket
properties.description: GCS bucket for Vertex batch input/output.

properties.name: vertex.batch.output-prefix
properties.description: Output prefix for Vertex batch results.

properties.name: vertex.batch.poll-interval
properties.description: Poll interval for Vertex batch status checks.

properties.name: vertex.batch.credentials-json
properties.description: Service account JSON content for Vertex batch jobs.
